title: Booming Pool/Spa Business, B2B and B2C, residual income, growing
description:
Pools, Spa and Water Feature Care is deemed an “Essential Service” making the pool business model a weekly recurring revenue/subscription model.

The high profit margins and low overhead mixed with our proven business model, and untouchable training methods will knock your flip flops off. This Executive Model has taken the seasonality out of this space and turned it into a Year-Round, Recurring Revenue, Scalable Machine, all run from your smart phone!

Competitive Advantages
-High Margins – Low Overhead
-Totally Mobile (run from your phone)
-With a technician in place, you can run everything through the software. No pen, No paper to run this business.
-Systems and Playbooks for Administration and Technician roles
-Year round, NOT seasonal
-Recurring revenue (A pool/spa must be serviced weekly on residential side, daily on commercial)
-Customer Call Centre (24-7-365)
-In House CRM
-In House Marketing Teams - Social and Digital
-Service Vans with water testing machines built in and all equipment required for services
-High Ticket Add On Sales and Services

Top 5 Benefits
-Essential Service - pools need weekly maintenance
-Commercial work with daily maintenance
-Recurring Revenue/Subscription Model
-Low Investment with Turnkey Mobile Ownership Model
-Multiple High-Ticket Add-On Sales & Services
-Call Center & Marketing Team

Ad#:2361272
